action.reasoning: Observation: test_prep.py fails with NameError (missing import os), train.py is truncated/incomplete (no loss calc, optimizer step, save logic), persistent image token/feature mismatch error (even when counts appear equal) from Qwen2VL forward due to template/processor handling of dynamic screenshot res + visual merger dim mismatch on load (2048 vs 1280, reinited). No successful eval yet after 8 iters. Predict.py also truncated (incomplete point handling, no final JSON write). Analysis: Single full-template processor call is correct per docs but debug prints needed to confirm pad count vs grid_thw; complete loop with proper label masking via assistant header search; fixed res + system msg helps alignment; reinit of visual is acceptable for LoRA but limits perf. test_prep.py is leftover, make it a data inspector. Decision: Fix/overwrite all 3 scripts with complete non-truncated code, full debug prints for mismatch diagnosis, complete training loop (8 steps on 32 samples), proper save, complete predict with all parsers/clip/rescale/defaults/JSON output per contract. Run test_prep+train then submit_eval for first grounding_score + time meas before scaling.
